voidRollDescPart2: . All queued moves are wiped, and your turn ends immediately!
rulesDicing2: Roll doubles (e.g., 4+4) to get another roll. All rolls are queued for your turn.
rulesDicing3: Rolling a 1 and a 3 forfeits your entire turn immediately.
rulesCombat1: Landing on a square with a single opponent piece captures it, sending it back to base.
rulesCombat2: Squares marked with 'X' are Safe Zones. Pieces here cannot be captured by normal moves.
rulesCombat3: Two pieces of the same color on one square form a shield and cannot be captured by a single piece.
rulesCombat4: A Pair Shield can only be broken by using a double roll to land two of your pieces on it in the same turn.
rulesCombat5: A newly spawning piece CAN capture an opponent on a Safe Zone.
rulesWinning1: You must capture at least one opponent piece to unlock your "Home Stretch" (the final column leading to the center).
rulesWinning2: Pieces in their Home Stretch are immune to capture.
rulesWinning3: The first player to get all 4 pieces to the center goal wins.
rulesWinning4: You can overshoot the goal. Any remaining dice value must be used by another piece if possible.
shareLinkInstruction: Share this link with your friends to let them join your match.
onlineHumansRequired: Online games require at least 2 human players.
maxOneBotInFourPlayer: Maximum 1 bot allowed in a 4-player game.
allHumansMustBeClaimed: All human seats must be claimed before starting.
pageTitle: Dyut Board Game | Play Online Chaupar & Pachisi
historyOriginsText: Dyut is inspired by ancient Indian cross and circle board games such as Chaupar, Chausar, and Pachisi. These games date back thousands of years and have deep cultural significance in Indian history, famously depicted in the epic Mahabharata.
historyGameplayText: Traditional Pachisi is played on a cloth board in the shape of a cross. Pieces move around the board based on the throw of cowrie shells or long dice (pasa). Dyut brings this strategic depth to the digital age, introducing new mechanics like Pair Shields and Dual Spawn Attacks while preserving the core spirit of the classic.
aboutDeveloperText: This digital adaptation of the classic cross and circle game was developed with passion to bring traditional strategy games to a modern audience.
aboutContactText: Have feedback, found a bug, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you!
tutorialDesc_spawn: You need a double roll (e.g., 4+4) to spawn a piece from your base onto the board. Click your highlighted base piece, then click "Spawn".
tutorialSuccess_spawn: Great job! Your piece is now on the board.
tutorialDesc_move: Select your piece on the board and choose how many spaces to move. You can use the full sum or split the dice between pieces.
tutorialDesc_capture: Land exactly on an opponent's piece to capture it and send it back to their base. This pays your "Blood Debt", allowing you to enter the center goal.
tutorialDesc_safe_zone: Squares marked with an X are Safe Zones. If an opponent is on a Safe Zone, you cannot capture them, and they block you from moving past them.
tutorialSuccess_safe_zone: Notice how you cannot move your piece to the safe zone occupied by the opponent.
tutorialDesc_pair_shield: Two pieces of the same color on a single square form a Pair Shield. A single piece cannot capture them. Notice how your move is blocked.
tutorialSuccess_pair_shield: Exactly! A single piece is powerless against a Pair Shield.
tutorialDesc_pair_attack: To break an opponent's Pair Shield, you must form your own Pair Shield and land on them using a double roll.
tutorialSuccess_pair_attack: Incredible! You crushed their Pair Shield with a Pair Attack.
leavePublicMatchConfirm: Leave the match? You will be replaced by a bot and cannot rejoin.
returnToMenuConfirm: Return to main menu? Progress will be saved.
wipeProgressConfirm: A saved game exists. Starting a new game will wipe your progress. Are you sure?
uniqueColorsRequired: Each active player must have a unique color.
failedToCreateLobby: Failed to create online lobby. Please check your Firestore Security Rules in the Firebase Console!
publicMatchDisconnect: You have disconnected from this public match and cannot rejoin. You have been replaced by a bot.
hostOffline: The host has disconnected. Lobby closed.
lobbyFullOrCorrupt: This lobby is full. Redirecting to menu...
